data.summary: [Blue Archive 11/08/2021 (Mon) Grand Opening!] Announcing the long-awaited official release date of
data.body:
[Blue Archive 11/08/2021 (Mon) Grand Opening!]

Announcing the long-awaited official release date of Blue Archive!
Please wait just a little longer! We'll be seeing you soon!
(The launch date will be based on UTC)

https://nexon.link/9P0
#BlueArchive
